title: jasione amethystina subsp. tomentosa
intro: Jasione amethystina subsp. tomentosa is a subspecies of the Jasione amethystina plant, commonly known as the Toadflax or Purple Jasione, a flowering plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and North Africa. The medicinal properties of this plant include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Jasione amethystina subsp. tomentosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory conditions, and provide protection against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health issues.
